data.title: $1.7B stablecoin inflows surge by 414% amid Washington yield rules debate, stalling US market discussions.
data.description: According to data from Messari, there has been a significant 414% increase in weekly inflows of stablecoins, reaching $1.7 billion. This surge comes amidst an ongoing debate regarding yield-bearing stablecoins, causing a delay in discussions surrounding the structure of the US market.

data.title: Grünenthal licenses exclusive South Korean rights to Qutenza® to BCWorld Pharm
data.description: On March 5, 2026, in Aachen, Germany and Yeoju, South Korea, Grünenthal, a prominent company in pain management and related illnesses, joined BCWorld Pharm Co., Ltd. ("BCWP"), a specialty company that is broadening its pain management portfolio globally. The partnership aims to strengthen their positions in the market and provide innovative solutions to a wider range of patients. Both companies are leaders in the global healthcare sector, and their collaboration is projected to significantly impact the industry.
